problem id: 938b81c2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(1)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  01110000 -> 00111111
  00001101 -> 10100111
  01111101 -> 01111111
  11111010 -> 11111111
  01101001 -> 01111101
  00111010 -> 00011111
  01100001 -> 01111101
  10000010 -> 01111011
  00011101 -> 10001111

query: 01110101
predicted answer: 01111111
